mnemonics: JAVA JDK & SDK: Just Download Kits & Software Development Kit. Remember the order: JDK first, then Android SDK.
keyPoints: Install the Java Development Kit (JDK) as it is required for Android development.
Download and install Android Studio, the official IDE, which bundles the Android SDK.
Use the SDK Manager within Android Studio to install specific platform tools and system images for your target Android version.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to set the ANDROID_HOME environment variable or incorrectly configuring the PATH for SDK tools.
Installing an incompatible or outdated version of the JDK that causes Gradle build errors.
Not accepting the necessary Android SDK licenses in the terminal, which prevents the SDK components from being fully installed.
